name: Machglass Windscreens
description: Auckland-based windscreen and auto glass replacement company. New Zealand owned, established 2008. Services cars, trucks, buses, commercial vehicles, and machinery across greater Auckland and beyond.

services.name: Windscreen Replacement
services.description: Front windscreen replacement for all makes and models of cars, trucks, buses, and commercial vehicles

services.name: Car Glass (Side & Back)
services.description: Door glass, rear screen, quarter vent, and tailgate replacement for cars, wagons, and SUVs

services.name: Truck & Bus Glass
services.description: Windscreen and body glass replacement for 100+ truck and bus makes

services.name: Machinery Glass
services.description: Windscreen replacement for excavators, rollers, bulldozers, and heavy machinery

services.name: Mobile Service
services.description: On-site windscreen fitting at your home or workplace throughout Auckland

services.name: Insurance Claims
services.description: Direct billing to all major insurance companies with hassle-free claims processing

services.name: Export Orders
services.description: Worldwide shipping of windscreens and auto glass
